settings.title: Settings
settings.autoDeleteHistory: Automatically delete search history every week
settings.exportFavorites: Export favorites to a CSV file
settings.usernameInvalid: Only letters, numbers, dot and underscore (3–30 chars)
settings.manageSearchBody: This removes all saved searches from the server for your account.
settings.locationDenied: Location permission was denied or unavailable.
settings.locationNoBrowser: This browser does not support geolocation.
settings.notifDenied: Notifications were blocked. Enable them in the browser settings to use this option.
settings.notifNoBrowser: Notifications are not supported in this browser.
settings.deleteConfirmHtml: This permanently deletes your account and cannot be undone. Type DELETE to confirm.
settings.deleteMismatch: Please type DELETE exactly to confirm.

geo.enableInSettings: Turn on “Enable Location Tracking” in Settings to use this feature.
